clEntries.8.1.6: v8.1.5: Added Smart Solar Soil Sensor (_TZE284_rqcuwlsa) to soil_sensor driver, Added Insoma 2-way irrigation valve (_TZE284_fhvpaltk) to valve_irrigation driver, Added 238 fingerprints from forum research, Added 53 fingerprints validated from Z2M/ZHA/JohanBendz community sync, Fixed Tuya DP battery initialization crash
clEntries.8.1.5: v8.1.5 — 238 new fingerprints, Smart Solar Soil Sensor, Insoma irrigation valve, battery init fix, SOS/BSEED/Avatto WT198 fixes, SmartDivisor math, mainsPowered optimization, 53 FPs validated.
clEntries.8.1.4: . New capabilities: measure_frequency, measure_power_factor, alarm_gas, alarm_siren, alarm_vibration, alarm_water_high, boost_mode. 82 Johan SDK3 fingerprints added. 5 bug fixes. 1208 fingerprints auto-healed.
clEntries.8.1.3: Bug fix: ZY-M100 settings now expose correctly. 41 new flow cards across drivers. WiFi flow cards complete. Updated flow support for climate_sensor, din_rail, garage_door, radiator_valve, and more.
clEntries.8.1.2: bed_sensor driver added. Fixed 3 fingerprint collisions (device_din_rail/EMQMWTYM→doorbell, switch_1gang/TVUARKSA→plug_energy_monitor, button_wireless_smart/MRPEVH8P→button_wireless_1). Fixed curtain_motor_tilt flow cards, valve_irrigation class, bed_sensor settings.
clEntries.8.1.1: v8.1.1: Fixed Issue #331 — Settings tab crash on 6 drivers (Hybrid*Base renamed to Unified*Base). Fixed curtain_motor_tilt missing flow cards (turn_on, turn_off, toggle). Fixed valve_irrigation device class (thermostat→socket). Added bed_sensor driver for _TZE200_seq9cm6u. Added CT Clamp _TZE28C1000000_81yrt3lo to power_clamp_meter. New fingerprints across 8 drivers.
clEntries.8.1.0: New fingerprints for RGB bulbs, RGBW bulbs, air purifiers, and air quality sensors. Soil sensor driver added. Bug fixes for bulb color control and air quality reporting.
clEntries.7.5.53: v7.5.52: Fixed button_wireless_3 and button_wireless_4 driver issues (diagnostic Log 99ead539), Fixed ir_blaster device capability handling, Fixed soil_sensor measure_soil_moisture capability, Fixed plug_smart driver compose, Fixed switch driver issues
clEntries.7.5.52: Bug fixes for button_wireless_3/4, ir_blaster, soil_sensor, plug_smart and switch drivers. Fixed diagnostic issues Log 99ead539.
clEntries.7.5.51: Bug fix: resolved fingerprint collision for _TZ3000_h1ipgkwn. Improved USB dongle switch driver with flow cards and multi-endpoint support. Added new fingerprints.
